title: Celeste Create Rebalanced
description: Changes the recipes in create. Changing the game play loop in a hellish way :)
body:
# Celeste Create Rebalanced
Create is all fun and games, but what if you wanted it to be a bit more... hellish? Well in this datapack I modified the recipes so that the game play is more complex and there is way less cheesy ways to work around intended challenges!

## Changes

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# VANILLA CREATE
Compact Snow -> Nothing [No more snow golem abuse]
Compact Ice&Bees -> Ice [ Your welcome Beezu :) ]
Wash Ice -> Snow [No More Blue Ice]
Wash Magma Block -> Deepslate [No more Obsidian]

Lower Chances of ore from Gravel/Sand/SoulSand [No more infinite ores!]

# MOLTEN + DECO
Melt coins into its molten form! 
Coin + Red Sand Paper -> 70% of original molten ore
> recipe logic: To get value back from a coin u need to sand it down to dust then back into ore, so the recipe calls for sand paper! This is just so u dont accidently melt ur coins unless its INTENTIONAL

</details>


Features in these modpacks :)
- Celeste Create Hell
